name: Shrimp Etouffee, Piccadilly Style
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (10 3/4-oz each) condensed cream of mushroom soup (low-salt variety)
3 teaspoons Old Bay brand crab boil seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine or butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and bell pepper; sauté until tender.
3. Stir in the condensed low-salt mushroom, celery, and tomato soups, as well as the crab boil seasoning.
4. Simmer for 15 minutes, stirring often.
5. Rinse shrimp in very hot water to break apart, then drain.
6. Add shrimp to the sauce; simmer until shrimp are tender (about 10-15 minutes).
7. If desired, undercook the shrimp and reheat the etouffée in the oven at about 325°F for complete warming through.
8. Serve over boiled long-grain rice.
